trained_with: RISE-style WM-rollout DiffusionNFT RL on joint-SFT init

v13_changes_from_v12.kl_beta: 1e-4 -> 1e-2 (100x tighter, anchors policy near SFT prior)
v13_changes_from_v12.wm_num_sampling_steps: 15 -> 30 (restores OpenSora trained default, narrows WM-real visual gap)

eval_protocol: 496 envs (8-divisible), 240 max steps, 4 flow-matching denoise, action_cond not provided
conclusion: v13 (kl_beta=1e-2 + denoise=30) is the first RL run to produce a ckpt above the joint-SFT baseline on real LIBERO-spatial. Step 10 at 87.90% success_once beats baseline 87.10% by +0.80 pts. The peak is early (step 10) and the policy still slowly degrades thereafter (-7 pts by step 50), confirming that the WM-real visual gap remains the dominant failure channel — tighter KL slows but does not eliminate it. Best ckpt = step 10.
